description_long: This is a male elderly person with a robust build, dressed in a dark blue puffy jacket over a gray shirt and gray pants. He has short, neatly styled gray hair and a prominent, expressive face with a furrowed brow and pronounced jawline. His posture is slightly hunched forward, suggesting age or exertion, and his arms are bent at the elbows as if in mid-stride. The shoes are brown and sturdy, suitable for walking on urban surfaces. The clothing is casual and practical, with no visible patterns or accessories. The overall appearance is that of an older man walking purposefully, likely in an outdoor urban environment.
description: An elderly man with short gray hair, wearing a dark blue jacket, gray shirt, and gray pants, walking with a slightly hunched posture.
description_view_0: Front view showing the man's expressive face, short gray hair, and the full front of his blue jacket and gray clothing.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of his face, the volume of the jacket, and the forward motion of his left arm.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of his head, the puffy blue jacket, and the straight fall of his gray pants.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the right profile of his face, the jacket's fit, and the stride of his right leg.
attribute_clothing_style: Casual urban attire consisting of a dark blue puffy jacket, gray shirt, gray pants, and brown shoes; no visible patterns or accessories.
attribute_posture: Slightly hunched, mid-stride walking posture with arms bent.
attribute_facial_features: Prominent brow, pronounced jawline, expressive face with visible wrinkles, no facial hair or glasses.
